source:
Reports invalid security role names.

Example:


  <web-app>
    <security-role>
      <role-name>custom#role</role-name> // Error: invalid name
    </security-role>
    <security-role>
      <role-name>customRole</role-name> // Good name
    </security-role>
  </web-app>
target:
Meldet ungültige Sicherheitsrollennamen.

Beispiel:


  <web-app>
    <security-role>
      <role-name>custom#role</role-name> // Error: invalid name
    </security-role>
    <security-role>
      <role-name>customRole</role-name> // Good name
    </security-role>
  </web-app>

source: Show a popup with the list of toolwindow tabs
target: Popup mit der Liste der Toolfenster-Registerkarten anzeigen

source: Ignore fields initialized in setUp() method
Interface functions declaration should have no body

Reports all strings with an interpolation prefix.

The quick for the inspection fix removes the interpolation prefix, updates interpolation entries and escapes unsafe dollar characters.

Example:


val foo = $$"""
{
    "foo": $ref,
    "bar": {
        "baz": "$20"
        "boo": "$${100 + 200}"
    }
}
"""

After the quick fix is applied:


val foo = """
{
    "foo": ${'$'}ref,
    "bar": {
        "baz": "$20"
        "boo": "${100 + 200}"
    }
}
"""
target:
Meldet alle Strings mit einem Interpolationspräfix.

Der Quick-Fix für die Inspection entfernt das Interpolationspräfix, aktualisiert Interpolationseinträge und maskiert unsichere Dollarzeichen.

Beispiel:


val foo = $$"""
{
    "foo": $ref,
    "bar": {
        "baz": "$20"
        "boo": "$${100 + 200}"
    }
}
"""

Nach Anwendung des Quick-Fix:


val foo = """
{
    "foo": ${'$'}ref,
    "bar": {
        "baz": "$20"
        "boo": "${100 + 200}"
    }
}
"""

To compare active editor with the clipboard contents, right-click anywhere in the editor and choose Compare with Clipboard from the context menu.

source:
Reports the following JPA specification errors:
  • Entity listener classes without public no-argument constructors
  • Entity listener methods with incorrect signatures

Example:


  @Entity
  @EntityListeners(value = JavaEntityListener.class)
  class JavaEntity { ... }

  class JavaEntityListener {

    @PostLoad
    void postLoad(String parameter) { ... } // Error: method 'postLoad' should take parameter of type 'Object' here
  }
target:
Meldet die folgenden JPA-Spezifikationsfehler:
  • Entity-Listener-Klassen ohne öffentliche parameterlose Konstruktoren
  • Entity-Listener-Methoden mit falschen Signaturen

Beispiel:


  @Entity
  @EntityListeners(value = JavaEntityListener.class)
  class JavaEntity { ... }

  class JavaEntityListener {

    @PostLoad
    void postLoad(String parameter) { ... } // Error: method 'postLoad' should take parameter of type 'Object' here
  }
